playbook.intent: Qualified lead to 45-min discovery call yielding qualified-or-disqualified verdict + pain map + budget signal + proposal go/no-go.
playbook.scope: Founder runs a structured first call with a qualified lead. Output: qualified-or-disqualified decision, pain map, budget signal, proposal go/no-go. Exit artifact: discovery notes + verdict + next action booked.

success-criteria.criterion: Pain map captured in 3 layers (symptom, cause, cost)

stage.name: Open + frame
stage.intent: 5 min - set the agenda, the rules, the time.

tasks.task: Ask what success looks like at end of call

stage.decision-gate: Advance once lead confirms agenda and timing.

stage.name: Pain map

tasks.task: Map symptom to cause to cost

stage.decision-gate: Advance if dominant pain is clearly articulated with cost.

stage.name: Budget + decision
stage.decision-gate: Advance only with explicit budget range AND signoff path.

stage.name: Verdict + next step
stage.intent: 5 min - propose / kill / clarify, in writing same day.

tasks.task: Book next step OR send polite decline

stage.decision-gate: Required: written verdict + sent follow-up within same day.

extra.value: [Full requirements elicitation - happens post-signature, Demo / pitch deck - distinct call type]
[Lead passed triage with ICP fit signal, Pre-call form returned with 3 baseline questions]

[Pitching during discovery - converts learning into selling and breaks rapport, Skipping budget because 'it is awkward' - bites at proposal time, Not writing the verdict same day - memory degrades fast]
['Did I learn or did I sell?', 'Is the pain map sourced from the lead''s words, not my framing?', 'Did I write a verdict before opening Slack?']
{human: faion get-content discovery-call-run-45-min --format md, agent: faion get-content discovery-call-run-45-min --format context, json: faion get-content discovery-call-run-45-min --format json}
[{version: 0.1.0, date: 2026-05-20, note: Initial draft for F-064 P5 micro-agency founder persona}]
